title: Modern Decor Outdoor
description: This mod adds outdoor furniture like pool tiles, sun loungers, chairs, umbrellas, and even an inflatable flamingo for the pool. Perfect for creating modern pools, patios, and gardens in Minecraft with a stylish, relaxing vibe.
body:
![LOGO](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8f4f335036dd94e525e5b0e1610665bbe53c5a3.png)
Modern Decor Outdoor is a mod featuring a range of stylish outdoor furniture and decor, including modern pool tiles, sun loungers, deckchairs, chairs, umbrellas, and a fun inflatable flamingo for pool fun.

![sofa ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e095124d194872e89bb158ca560a7706a0bfb098.webp)
It also includes new fireplaces, wooden materials, wood panel decks, lamps, barbecues, and more all designed with a sleek, contemporary touch to enhance any outdoor space.

Decoration Examples
![decoration examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f2c870a25c49ea1947d4323bcc2a1b1373b9206.webp)
Outdoor Lighting:

and Swimming pool

![barbeque](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5845f2bc9b27d33abf3b37812e2bbb1c8c27e683_0.webp)
